title: The Apothecary's Latitude
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In 1764, a British naval surgeon falsifies longitude readings to strand his ship on an unmapped Pacific island, believing its unique flora holds a scurvy cure — but the island keeps something else.
long_description: In 1764, a British naval surgeon falsifies longitude readings to strand his ship on an unmapped Pacific island, believing its unique flora holds a scurvy cure — but the island keeps something else.
